feed.title: Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan & Tim Howard (filtered)

entry.title: [UFS] Spain Are World Champions! Messi’s Future, USMNT Reality Check & Pulisic to MLS? | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
Spain are World Champions again! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, Landon and Tim are joined by former Atlanta United and USMNT goalkeeper Brad Guzan to discuss Spain’s triumph over Argentina, Messi’s last World Cup, and where the USMNT goes from here, including if Mauricio Pochettino stays on as head coach.
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
YouTube Chapters 00:00 Intro 01:52 Spain Win World Cup 09:57 Enzo Fernandez's Red Card 15:13 Now What for Argentina? 25:52 USMNT on USLNT 37:25 Does Pochettino Stay? 43:31 Pulisic to MLS? 1:00:54 Mailbag
#LandonDonovan #TimHoward #USMNT #USSoccer #2026WorldCup #FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup #Messi #BradGuzan #EnzoFernandez #FerranTorres #LamineYamal #MauricioPochettino #ChristianPulisic #SpainWin #SpainWorldChampions
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3. Thank you to our additional sponsors: AT&T. Connecting Changes Everything. Visit https://att.com/guarantee to learn more.
Coors Light. Choose Chill. Get Coors Light delivered. Go to CoorsLight.com/USLNT
FanDuel. With FanDuel's Super Sub, if your player is subbed out, your bet stays in. That's right, if your player leaves the match, your bet continues on with the substitute. Download the FanDuel Sportsbook app and place your bets today.
Walmart. Walmart plays on Saturdays. Who knew? Visit walmart.com/MLS
This episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was engineered, edited and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp with support from Eric Newell. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton.
Unfiltered Soccer 👉 https://unfilteredsoccer.com/ Instagram 👉 / unfilteredsoccer Twitter/X 👉 / unfilteredsoccr TikTok 👉 / unfilteredsoccer Facebook 👉 / unfilteredsoccer
OTHER PODCASTS YOU MAY LIKE Style of Play - / @styleofplayshow Triple Option - http://tripleoptionshow.com Throwbacks - http://ThrowbacksShow.com Post Moves - http://PostMovesShow.com Cousins - http://vinceandtmac.com
entry.content:
Spain are World Champions again! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, Landon and Tim are joined by former Atlanta United and USMNT goalkeeper Brad Guzan to discuss Spain’s triumph over Argentina, Messi’s last World Cup, and where the USMNT goes from here, including if Mauricio Pochettino stays on as head coach.

New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).

09:57 Enzo Fernandez's Red Card
15:13 Now What for Argentina?
25:52 USMNT on USLNT
37:25 Does Pochettino Stay?
43:31 Pulisic to MLS?

entry.title: [UFS] World Cup Final Preview: Messi vs Lamine Yamal | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
Messi & Lamine Yamal are going to the World Cup final! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, Landon and Tim are talking about how Spain handled France on their way to their second ever World Cup final and how Argentina took out England as they look to defend their title as world champions. Plus we’re giving out some awards for the overall tournament and answering YOUR burning questions in the mailbag.
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.
Thank you to our additional sponsors:
AT&T. Connecting Changes Everything. Visit https://att.com/guarantee to learn more.
Coors Light. Choose Chill. Get Coors Light delivered. Go to CoorsLight.com/USLNT
FanDuel. With FanDuel's Super Sub, if your player is subbed out, your bet stays in. That's right, if your player leaves the match, your bet continues on with the substitute. Download the FanDuel Sportsbook app and place your bets today.
Walmart. Walmart plays on Saturdays. Who knew? Visit walmart.com/MLS
This live episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was engineered by Adam Braunstein, Eric Newell and Sammy Strittmatter, and was edited and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton

Messi & Lamine Yamal are going to the World Cup final! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, Landon and Tim are talking about how Spain handled France on their way to their second ever World Cup final and how Argentina took out England as they look to defend their title as world champions. Plus we’re giving out some awards for the overall tournament and answering YOUR burning questions in the mailbag.

entry.title: [UFS] Carlos Bocanegra on USMNT World Cup PLUS Tuchel vs Bellingham & a Haaland Debate | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
Carlos Bocanegra is getting Unfiltered! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, Landon and Tim by their former USMNT captain and teammate, Carlos Bocanegra, to talk about the current team USA roster, their memories of tournaments past, and preview the upcoming semifinal games in Dallas and Atlanta.
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.
Thank you to our additional sponsors:
Coors Light. Choose Chill. Get Coors Light delivered. Go to CoorsLight.com/USLNT
FanDuel. Download the FanDuel App to check out today's Soccer Daily Specials betting odds.
TCL. Have 10 feet? We engineered the sideline. Find the ultimate 98” TV experience at TCL.com
This live episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was engineered by Adam Braunstein, Carlos Sepulveda and Sammy Strittmatter, and was edited and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton.

entry.title: [UFS] Pulisic Under Fire, Messi’s Relief-Tears & Bellingham’s Masterclass | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
It’s time for the World Cup quarterfinals! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, Landon and Tim discuss if England and Jude Bellingham can get past Erling Haaland and Norway, what's going on with Alphonso Davies and Jesse Marsch in Canada, and if Messi and Argentina are lucky to have gotten past Egypt.
Plus, in our mailbag the guys dive into what went wrong with Christian Pulisic, whether or not Diego Luna would have made a difference in the Belgium game, and why Ricardo Pepi and Haji Wright weren’t good subs for Flo Balogun.
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
#LandonDonovan #TimHoward #USMNT #USSoccer #2026WorldCup #FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup #Messi #JudeBellingham #ErlingHaaland #Neymar #Ronaldo #AlphonsoDavies #JesseMarsch #ChristianPulisic #DiegoLuna #RicardoPepi #HajiWright
YouTube Chapters
00:00 Intro
1:52 – Argentina Eliminate Egypt
8:14 – Where is Alphonso Davies?
15:51 – Norway Shock Brazil
21:33 – Ronaldo’s Last International Match
29:56 – France vs Morocco Preview
34:00 – England Survive the Altitude
39:25 – Switzerland vs. Argentina
51:59 – Pulisic Under Fire
1:08:41 – What About Diego Luna?
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3. Thank you to our additional sponsors: AT&T. Connecting Changes Everything. Visit https://att.com/guarantee to learn more.
Coors Light. Choose Chill. Get Coors Light delivered. Go to CoorsLight.com/USLNT
FanDuel. With FanDuel's Super Sub, if your player is subbed out, your bet stays in. That's right, if your player leaves the match, your bet continues on with the substitute. Download the FanDuel Sportsbook app and place your bets today.
Walmart. Walmart plays on Saturdays. Who knew? Visit walmart.com/MLS
This episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was engineered, edited and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp with support from Eric Newell. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton.
Unfiltered Soccer 👉 https://unfilteredsoccer.com/ Instagram 👉 / unfilteredsoccer Twitter/X 👉 / unfilteredsoccr TikTok 👉 / unfilteredsoccer Facebook 👉 / unfilteredsoccer
OTHER PODCASTS YOU MAY LIKE Style of Play - / @styleofplayshow Triple Option - http://tripleoptionshow.com Throwbacks - http://ThrowbacksShow.com Post Moves - http://PostMovesShow.com Cousins - http://vinceandtmac.com
entry.content:
It’s time for the World Cup quarterfinals! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, Landon and Tim discuss if England and Jude Bellingham can get past Erling Haaland and Norway, what's going on with Alphonso Davies and Jesse Marsch in Canada, and if Messi and Argentina are lucky to have gotten past Egypt.

Plus, in our mailbag the guys dive into what went wrong with Christian Pulisic, whether or not Diego Luna would have made a difference in the Belgium game, and why Ricardo Pepi and Haji Wright weren’t good subs for Flo Balogun.

New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).

#LandonDonovan #TimHoward #USMNT #USSoccer #2026WorldCup #FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup #Messi #JudeBellingham #ErlingHaaland #Neymar #Ronaldo #AlphonsoDavies #JesseMarsch #ChristianPulisic #DiegoLuna #RicardoPepi #HajiWright

YouTube Chapters

1:52 – Argentina Eliminate Egypt

8:14 – Where is Alphonso Davies?

15:51 – Norway Shock Brazil

21:33 – Ronaldo’s Last International Match

29:56 – France vs Morocco Preview

34:00 – England Survive the Altitude

39:25 – Switzerland vs. Argentina

51:59 – Pulisic Under Fire

1:08:41 – What About Diego Luna?

Walmart. Walmart plays on Saturdays. Who knew? Visit walmart.com/MLS

This episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was engineered, edited and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp with support from Eric Newell. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton.

entry.title: [UFS] USMNT Beaten by Belgium: Pulisic Questions, Balogun Drama & Pochettino’s Status | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
Team USA’s World Cup is over. On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, we're talking about what happened against Belgium, the controversy surrounding Flo Balogun’s inclusion, and what is next for Team USA. Plus we’ll answer your burning questions in the AT&T Fan Connection!
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
#LandonDonovan #TimHoward #USMNT #USSoccer #2026WorldCup #FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup #FolarinBalogun #MalikTillman #redcard #usavsbelgium
YouTube Chapters 00:00 Intro 1:30 USMNT lose to Belgium 8:53 The 3rd Belgium Goal 14:23 Pulisic – Still Captain America? 27:21 The Red Card Controversy 37:29 USMNT – Success or Distress? 49:57 Should Pochettino Stay? 1:05:18 - Fan Connection
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.
Thank you to our additional sponsors:

Walmart. Walmart plays on Saturdays. Who knew? Visit walmart.com/MLS
This episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was engineered, edited and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp with support from Eric Newell. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton.
entry.content:
Team USA’s World Cup is over. On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, we're talking about what happened against Belgium, the controversy surrounding Flo Balogun’s inclusion, and what is next for Team USA. Plus we’ll answer your burning questions in the AT&T Fan Connection!

New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).

entry.title: [UFS] The Best USMNT Ever? Pulisic FLYING, Tillman SCORES, but Balogun sees RED | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
Team USA heads to the Round of 16! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, we're talking about how the US held off Bosnia and Herzegovina, Folarin Balogun’s red card, and what the plan is for our face-off against Belgium. We’ll take a trip around the rest of the tournament, including Jesse Marsch’s post-game pep talk, Sir Harry Kane is headed to Azteca, Paraguay and Morocco upsetting big European teams on penalties, and England powering past the Congo. Plus we’ll answer your questions in the AT&T Fan Connection!
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
#LandonDonovan #TimHoward #USMNT #USSoccer #2026WorldCup #FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup #FolarinBalogun #MalikTillman #MichaelOlise #usaredcard #usaworldcup
YouTube Chapters 00:00 Intro 2:35 – USMNT on USLNT 4:32 – Was it a red card? 9:36 – Flo Scores! 12:44 – “Do not go up and over the wall!” 18:36 – Looking ahead to Belgium 29:00 – Sir Harry Keep England In 30:10 – Mexico are on a tear 36:28 – Michael Olise – Player of the Tournament 38:54 – Turning Down a Penalty Kick 47:38 - Yassine Bounou, Moroccan Hero 54:36 - Mailbag
This episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was engineered by Adam Braunstein and Eric Newell, with editing and mastering by Jeremy Steinkamp. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton.
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.
Thank you to our additional sponsors:
AT&T. Connecting Changes Everything. Visit https://att.com/guarantee to learn more.

FanDuel. With FanDuel's Super Sub, if your player is subbed out, your bet stays in. That's right, if your player leaves the match, your bet continues on with the substitute. Download the FanDuel Sportsbook app and place your bets today.
Walmart. Walmart plays on Saturdays. Who knew? Visit walmart.com/MLS

entry.content:
Team USA heads to the Round of 16! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, we're talking about how the US held off Bosnia and Herzegovina, Folarin Balogun’s red card, and what the plan is for our face-off against Belgium. We’ll take a trip around the rest of the tournament, including Jesse Marsch’s post-game pep talk, Sir Harry Kane is headed to Azteca, Paraguay and Morocco upsetting big European teams on penalties, and England powering past the Congo. Plus we’ll answer your questions in the AT&T Fan Connection!

New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).

#LandonDonovan #TimHoward #USMNT #USSoccer #2026WorldCup #FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup #FolarinBalogun #MalikTillman #MichaelOlise #usaredcard #usaworldcup

entry.title: [UFS] Does USMNT’s Türkiye Loss Matter? Plus Bosnia Knockout Clash & Pochettino’s Plan | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
Everyone calm down! Landon Donovan and Tim Howard are unbothered by the United States Men’s National Team’s last-minute loss to Türkiye in the final group stage game of the World Cup. With USMNT having already wrapped up topping the group, head coach Mauricio Pochettino decided to rotate the squad and ultimately lost a tough-fought game against an eliminated Türkiye team.
Landon and Tim give their thoughts on the game, recap the group and preview the USMNT’s upcoming Round of 32 matchup against Bosnia and Herzegovina. The guys also take a trip around the World Cup with Cape Verde advancing in their first-ever tournament appearance – to face Lionel Messi’s Argentina – and other favorite World Cup moments. Plus we’ll answer your questions in the mailbag!
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
#LandonDonovan #TimHoward #USMNT #USSoccer #2026WorldCup #FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup #LionelMessi #CristianoRonaldo #ChristianPulisic
YouTube Chapters 0:00 Intro 2:12 USMNT's loss to Türkiye 11:57 Previewing Bosnia and Herzegovina 17:41 Potential Pochettino extension 23:25 Around the World Cup 25:58 Mbappé and Messi 27:43 Muslera's mistake 30:45 France’s dominance 39:49 Memo Ochoa's moment 43:05 Fan Questions
This episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was recorded at Quad Studios in NYC. The episode was edited, engineered, and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton.
Thank you to our sponsor TCL.

entry.content:
Everyone calm down! Landon Donovan and Tim Howard are unbothered by the United States Men’s National Team’s last-minute loss to Türkiye in the final group stage game of the World Cup. With USMNT having already wrapped up topping the group, head coach Mauricio Pochettino decided to rotate the squad and ultimately lost a tough-fought game against an eliminated Türkiye team.

Landon and Tim give their thoughts on the game, recap the group and preview the USMNT’s upcoming Round of 32 matchup against Bosnia and Herzegovina. The guys also take a trip around the World Cup with Cape Verde advancing in their first-ever tournament appearance – to face Lionel Messi’s Argentina – and other favorite World Cup moments. Plus we’ll answer your questions in the mailbag!

New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon are LIVE during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. entry.title: [UFS] Ronaldo is BACK, Messi BREAKS RECORD, & Rebecca Lowe Joins the Show | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
Messi's breaking records at 39! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, we're joined by Rebecca Lowe, FOX's lead studio host for the World Cup to talk Lionel Messi’s incredible run, Mbappe trying to catch him, Ronaldo getting on the score sheet, and England falling apart against Ghana. The guys are addressing Folarin Balogun’s comments about beating Landon’s record, whether or not Mauricio Pochettino should rest USMNT players against Türkiye, and who the US might face in the round of 32. Plus we’ll answer your questions in the AT&T Fan Connection!
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim drop every Wednesday & Saturday during this summer’s tournament. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
#LandonDonovan #TimHoward #RebeccaLowe #USMNT #USSoccer #2026WorldCup #FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup #England #HarryKane #EnglandvsGhana #Zlatan #ThierryHenry #Ronaldo #CristianoRonaldo #Messi #LionelMessi #ChristianPulisic #FolarinBalogun #EloyRoom #Curacao #Germany #USAvsTurkiye
YouTube Chapters 00:00 Intro 2:17 - Rebecca Lowe Joins the Show 17:42 – England or the USA? 26:23 – Rapid Fire with Becks 34:01 – Ronaldo is BACK 36:58 – Messi the Goat at 39 44:43 – Round of 32 Preview 46:32 – USMNT on USLNT 52:39 – Balogun vs Donovan 59:19 – Goalkeeper Record: Room or Howard 1:05:54 - Mailbag
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.
Thank you to our additional sponsors:
AT&T. Connecting Changes Everything. Visit https://att.com/guarantee to learn more.
Coors Light. Choose Chill. Get Coors Light delivered. Go to CoorsLight.com/USLNT

Walmart. Walmart plays on Saturdays. Who knew? Visit walmart.com/MLS

Messi's breaking records at 39! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, we're joined by Rebecca Lowe, FOX's lead studio host for the World Cup to talk Lionel Messi’s incredible run, Mbappe trying to catch him, Ronaldo getting on the score sheet, and England falling apart against Ghana. The guys are addressing Folarin Balogun’s comments about beating Landon’s record, whether or not Mauricio Pochettino should rest USMNT players against Türkiye, and who the US might face in the round of 32. Plus we’ll answer your questions in the AT&T Fan Connection!

entry.title: [UFS] Can the USMNT Actually Win the World Cup? Tim Howard & Landon Donovan Debate | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
The US have won their FIFA World Cup Group! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, our hosts break down the U.S.’s win over Australia including Alex Freeman’s first World Cup goal. Plus Paraguay holds Türkiye off while down a man, Neymar to return soon from injury as Brazil look to lock up their group, and Canada absolutely dominate Qatar. And Tim and Landon are taking YOUR World Cup questions in our mailbag.
#FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup2026 #AlexFreeman #RicardoPepi #FolarinBalogun #USMNT #Paraguay #Turkiye #Brazil #Mexico #SouthKorea #Canada #JesseMarsch #JonathanDavid #LandonDonovan #TimHoward #UnfilteredSoccer #Soccer #Football #WorldCup #MiguelAlmiron #JesseMarsch #ChristianPulisic #WestonMcKennie #SerginoDest #Neymar #Raphinha
YouTube Chapters: 0:00 Intro 1:41 USMNT vs. Australia recap 11:52 Seattle vs. LA atmosphere 17:46 Pulisic's injury 23:49 USMNT 2-0 29:47 Almirón receives red for covering mouth 35:06 Around the World Cup 47:25 Fan Questions 59:44 Can the USMNT win the World Cup?
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim drop every Tuesday. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
Thank you to today's sponsor:
TCL. Find the ultimate 98" TV experience at TCL.com.
This episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was edited and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp, with engineering support from Adam Braunstein. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton.
entry.content:
The US have won their FIFA World Cup Group! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, our hosts break down the U.S.’s win over Australia including Alex Freeman’s first World Cup goal. Plus Paraguay holds Türkiye off while down a man, Neymar to return soon from injury as Brazil look to lock up their group, and Canada absolutely dominate Qatar. And Tim and Landon are taking YOUR World Cup questions in our mailbag.

entry.title: [UFS] Messi, Mbappé & Haaland Shine in a Wild FIFA World Cup | Unfiltered Soccer LIVE
entry.summary:
Lionel Messi is already making history at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. On this episode of Unfiltered Soccer, Landon Donovan and Tim Howard break down Messi's brilliant performance for Argentina against Algeria, Erling Haaland's long-awaited World Cup debut for Norway, and Kylian Mbappé's standout showing in France's win over Senegal.
The guys also preview a crucial USMNT showdown with Australia, discuss the biggest storylines from around the tournament, and answer fan questions in the AT&T Fan Connection.
From Messi and Mbappé to Haaland and the USMNT, we've got everything you need to know from the 2026 FIFA World Cup.
#FIFAWorldCup #WorldCup2026 #LionelMessi #Messi #KylianMbappe #Mbappe #ErlingHaaland #Haaland #Argentina #France #Norway #USMNT #LandonDonovan #TimHoward #UnfilteredSoccer #Soccer #Football #WorldCup
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim drop every Tuesday. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. Send your mailbag questions to feedback@unfilteredsoccer.com (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.
Thank you to our additional sponsors:
AT&T. Connecting Changes Everything. Visit https://att.com/guarantee to learn more.
Coors Light. Choose Chill. Get Coors Light delivered. Go to CoorsLight.com/USLNT
FanDuel. Secure your chance to score $100 BUCKS in bonus bets today. Download the FanDuel App to check out today's Soccer Daily Specials betting odds.
Walmart. Walmart plays on Saturdays. Who knew? Visit walmart.com/MLS
This episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was edited and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp, with engineering support from Eric Newell. Our producers are Jordan Rizzieri and Andrew Gundling. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editors are Kyle Curley and Finley Skelton.
entry.content:
Lionel Messi is already making history at the 2026 FIFA World Cup. On this episode of Unfiltered Soccer, Landon Donovan and Tim Howard break down Messi's brilliant performance for Argentina against Algeria, Erling Haaland's long-awaited World Cup debut for Norway, and Kylian Mbappé's standout showing in France's win over Senegal.

The guys also preview a crucial USMNT showdown with Australia, discuss the biggest storylines from around the tournament, and answer fan questions in the AT&T Fan Connection.

From Messi and Mbappé to Haaland and the USMNT, we've got everything you need to know from the 2026 FIFA World Cup.

entry.title: [UFS] USMNT DOMINATE Paraguay | Unfiltered Soccer Live from Los Angeles
entry.summary:
Unfiltered Soccer is LIVE in Los Angeles! Landon Donovan and Tim Howard are talking about the U.S. Men’s National Team’s performance against Paraguay right here in Los Angeles. Plus, the guys are joined by LA Chargers kicker Cameron Dicker, and they’re taking your questions in the AT&T Fan Connection.
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim drop every Tuesday. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. entry.title: [UFS] USMNT vs Portugal Reaction Livestream | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary: Landon and Tim talk USMNT vs Portugal! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, our hosts go live to discuss the U.S. Men’s National Team’s performance in Atlanta, Georgia including the team’s form, who is still fighting their way into the squad, and their updated World Cup USMNT Starting XI! Plus Tim and Landon break down how the World Cup competition is taking shape with only two friendlies left to go in June.
entry.content: Landon and Tim talk USMNT vs Portugal! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, our hosts go live to discuss the U.S. Men’s National Team’s performance in Atlanta, Georgia including the team’s form, who is still fighting their way into the squad, and their updated World Cup USMNT Starting XI! Plus Tim and Landon break down how the World Cup competition is taking shape with only two friendlies left to go in June.

entry.title: [UFS] Landon Donovan, Tim Howard & Cristian Roldan talk REAL football in San Francisco | Unfiltered Soccer
entry.summary:
Landon Donovan and Tim Howard head to San Francisco to talk REAL football with special guest Cristian Roldan (Seattle Sounders, USMNT). The guys dive into Cristian’s long career with the Sounders, and his relationship with USMNT head coach Mauricio Pochettino, who has been pointing to Roldan as an example for the team. Plus, the GOATs of US Soccer talk USMNT roster battles and whose MLS journey is at a crossroads before the 2026 season even kicks off.
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim drop every Tuesday. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content and to send your mailbag questions in to the show, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
Thanks to this episode’s sponsor NHTSA. We all seem to be in a rush these days, but when you’re behind the wheel, please, do not speed. So follow the speed limit; a few minutes saved by going faster, is never worth the risk. Learn more at https://www.nhtsa.gov.
Thank you to our additional sponsor Zip Recruiter.
This episode of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard was livestreamed from The Block in San Francisco, CA. It was produced by Chris Terlop, Andrew Gundling and Jordan Rizzieri. The episode was edited and mastered by Jeremy Steinkamp, with on-site engineering from Adam Braunstein. Our social media lead is Dan Armelli and our social editor is Kyle Curley.
Unfiltered Soccer 👉 https://unfilteredsoccer.com/ Instagram 👉 https://www.instagram.com/unfilteredsoccer/ Twitter/X 👉 https://twitter.com/unfilteredsoccr TikTok 👉 https://www.tiktok.com/@unfilteredsoccer Facebook 👉 https://www.facebook.com/UnfilteredSoccer/
OTHER PODCASTS YOU MAY LIKE Triple Option - http://tripleoptionshow.com Throwbacks - http://ThrowbacksShow.com Post Moves - http://PostMovesShow.com Cousins - https://www.youtube.com/@VinceAndTmac

Landon Donovan and Tim Howard head to San Francisco to talk REAL football with special guest Cristian Roldan (Seattle Sounders, USMNT). The guys dive into Cristian’s long career with the Sounders, and his relationship with USMNT head coach Mauricio Pochettino, who has been pointing to Roldan as an example for the team. Plus, the GOATs of US Soccer talk USMNT roster battles and whose MLS journey is at a crossroads before the 2026 season even kicks off.

Throwbacks - http://ThrowbacksShow.com
Post Moves - http://PostMovesShow.com
Cousins - https://www.youtube.com/@VinceAndTmac

entry.title: [UFS] World Cup Draw Reaction Livestream with Matt Freese
entry.summary:
The World Cup Draw is here! Landon Donovan and Tim Howard are joined by USMNT goalkeeper Matt Freese to talk about the U.S.’s group, how the Iceman feels about their chances and how the team will prepare over the next six months. Plus, the guys talk the USMNT’s history of opponents in the tournament, Tim and Landon’s previous World Cup experiences, and how the rest of the groups are shaking out.
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim drop every Tuesday. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content and to send your mailbag questions in to the show, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.
Thank you to our additional sponsors:
AT&T. Connecting Changes Everything. Visit https://att.com/guarantee to learn more.
Coors Light. Choose Chill. Get Coors Light delivered. Go to CoorsLight.com/USLNT
entry.content:
The World Cup Draw is here! Landon Donovan and Tim Howard are joined by USMNT goalkeeper Matt Freese to talk about the U.S.’s group, how the Iceman feels about their chances and how the team will prepare over the next six months. Plus, the guys talk the USMNT’s history of opponents in the tournament, Tim and Landon’s previous World Cup experiences, and how the rest of the groups are shaking out.

New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim drop every Tuesday. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content and to send your mailbag questions in to the show, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).

Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.

Thank you to our additional sponsors:

AT&T. Connecting Changes Everything. Visit https://att.com/guarantee to learn more.

entry.title: [UFS] USMNT vs Uruguay Reaction Livestream
entry.summary: Landon and Tim talk USMNT vs Uruguay! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, our hosts go live to discuss the U.S. Men’s National Team’s performance in Tampa, Florida including the team’s form, who is still fighting their way into the squad, and their updated World Cup USMNT Starting XI! Plus Tim and Landon break down how the World Cup competition is taking shape.
entry.content: Landon and Tim talk USMNT vs Uruguay! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, our hosts go live to discuss the U.S. Men’s National Team’s performance in Tampa, Florida including the team’s form, who is still fighting their way into the squad, and their updated World Cup USMNT Starting XI! Plus Tim and Landon break down how the World Cup competition is taking shape.

entry.title: [UFS] USMNT vs Australia Reaction Livestream
entry.summary:
Landon and Tim are talking USMNT vs Australia LIVE! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, our hosts went live to discuss the U.S. Men’s National Team 2-1 win over Australia in Commerce City, Colorado. The guys discuss the team’s form, Pochettino’s clear message to his players, who may have to fight their way back into the squad, and their updated World Cup Starting XI!
New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim drop every Tuesday. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content and to send your mailbag questions in to the show, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).
Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.
entry.content:
Landon and Tim are talking USMNT vs Australia LIVE! On Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard, our hosts went live to discuss the U.S. Men’s National Team 2-1 win over Australia in Commerce City, Colorado. The guys discuss the team’s form, Pochettino’s clear message to his players, who may have to fight their way back into the squad, and their updated World Cup Starting XI!

New episodes of Unfiltered Soccer with Landon and Tim drop every Tuesday. Subscribe to the show on YouTube and follow on all your favorite podcast platforms. For bonus content and to send your mailbag questions in to the show, follow on all social media platforms @UnfilteredSoccer. (https://www.unfilteredsoccer.com).

Unfiltered Soccer with Landon Donovan and Tim Howard is presented by Volkswagen. Learn more at https://bit.ly/4g8bZG3.
